title: nazal #5140
definition:
1) to flow, distil, flow forth or down, trickle, drop
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to flow
             1a1a) streams, floods (participle)
        1a2) to distil
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to flow
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to flow
             1a1a) streams, floods (participle)
        1a2) to distil
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to flow

    NASB:  to flow, trickle, drop, distill
